reviews.title: Best bang for your buck$
reviews.text: This is so convenient for Airbnbs or for guests that tend to forget the essentials at home. Highly recommend to make your guest feel that more special or for a more convenient way of travel.

title: oogiebear 360° Toothbrush - Training Toothbrush for Babies. Safe Ultra Soft Silicone Toothbrush with Teddy Bear Baby Gum Relief and Gum Massaging Base. Baby Must Haves. BPA Free
features: MAKES BRUSHING SAFE AND BEAR-ABLE - oogiebear’s adorable and innovative baby toothbrush provides better baby oral care and makes brushing tiny teeth fun with a soft bristle brush and bear head design that ensures it never goes in too deep.

FUN AND FUNCTIONAL DESIGN - oogiebear’s unique 360 degree toothbrush effectively cleans teeth and gums with short soft bristles. The soft silicone base is easy for baby to hold while premium grade silicone bumps stimulate gums.

BABY’S FIRST TOOTHBRUSH - Made for babies 3 months and older, oogiebear toothbrush is the perfect tool to get your baby used to brushing before graduating to their first big-kid toothbrush. Its stand-up base makes it easy to clean and store.

SUPERIOR QUALITY - oogiebear toothbrush is made with the highest quality food-grade silicone. Its extra-soft bristles are fun to chew and won’t break off or cause choking while its base has a silky touch that’s soothing to gums.

DOCTOR DESIGNED, MOM TESTED, PERIODONTIST APPROVED - Created by a registered pharmacist and mother and periodontist dad, oogiebear toothbrush is designed to make learning to brush easier for parents and baby for a lifetime of bright beautiful smiles.

reviews.title: Adorable toothbrush and great teether as well but pricey
reviews.text:
This toothbrush/teether is BPA free and made of soft silicone. The head of the cute bear prevents the toothbrush piece from going too far into the baby's mouth but it is still long enough to act as a teether and also massage the gums. Babies usually do not start getting teeth until about 6 months so it can help the child get used to the first steps of "brushing their teeth." The current price of $12.99 ($15.99 minus $3) is a bit pricey for this.

Always supervise during use and be careful to clean this regularly. Because the brush area is grooved, it is important to give this a vigorous cleaning in that area as food, lint, etc. can get caught in that area depending on where the baby puts it.

reviews.title: Convenient, choke-proof baby toothbrush and teether
reviews.text: The whole thing is designed so that baby can't choke on it no matter which part she puts in her mouth.  The whole 'handle' is bendy silicone, which she also likes as a teether.  The wide bear head makes it easy for her to grab and hold onto it.  The brush is on all sides that you don't have to keep turning it around to get both upper and lower teeth, and still goes in enough to brush her tongue and gums.  It's all about the convenience.

reviews.title: Baby toothbrush
reviews.text: Baby now has two adorable teeth and we just started using this toothbrush before bed every night. Not sure how this is supposed to work because we don’t use toothpaste but he laughs and laughs so we love using it. It’s such a cute part of his bedtime routine and as he gets older he will hopefully have a great association with brushing his teeth and dental hygiene because of this

reviews.title: It was a gift
reviews.text: It was a gift to my nieces son. She said he loves it. He’s only 6 months but it’s never too early to teach. She said he won’t let it go.

reviews.title: Well designed kids toothbrush
reviews.text: Very useful toothbrush. I got it for my 8 month old who already has a few teeth. I love the design. It is relatively large, which makes it easier to my baby to hold and shew in. Since the brush is round, it works from all angles. I highly recommend it.

title: EcoDent Tooth Powder Daily Care, Baking Soda Tooth Powder, Fluoride Free, Low Abrasion with Baking Soda, Tooth Powder for Toothbrush, Original Mint Tooth Powder (3 Pack-2 Oz Ea)
description:
Eco-Dent DailyCare Mint Toothpowder is made with baking soda, minerals, peppermint oil, and myrrh. It provides an economical way to support your oral health.
The effervescent formula reaches all areas of your mouth to clean deeply and freshen your breath with every use. Easy to apply with your toothbrush, the low abrasion formula protects delicate tooth enamel while delivering the legendary cleaning power of baking soda.
The tooth powder contains no fluoride, SLS, parabens, artificial sweeteners, colors, and is cruelty free and vegan friendly.
features: EFFERVESCENT TOOTHPOWDER: Eco Dent tooth powder delivers a deep cleaning action to your mouth while neutralizing acids.
GENTLE TOOTH POWDER: Our low abrasion powder for cleaning teeth is gentle on enamel and may be used alone or sprinkled over toothpaste.
TIME-TESTED INGREDIENTS: Our original mint tooth powder contains baking soda, minerals, and essential oils to support your oral care needs and freshen your breath.
ECONOMICAL & LONG LASTING: Our travel size toothpaste powder is a convenient and economical oral care solution that lasts for up to 200 brushings.
PREMIUM ORAL CARE: Eco-Dent DailyCare Baking Soda Toothpowder is used and recommended by dentists, oral surgeons, and periodontists.

reviews.title: Fresh breath minus harsh chemicals
reviews.text: I always enjoy a natural product and this right here does the job

reviews.title: Great toothpaste!
reviews.text:
I've used the anise and cinnamon flavors many times. I don't like mint toothpaste that overpowers. This one is more subtle, really impressed.

I've used this product for many years. Took a few brushes to get used to the salty baking powder taste, but it's been smooth sailing ever since... And no cavities!

reviews.title: Tooth Powder
reviews.text: This product is the bomb!  Been using it for years and always get compliments on how nice and white my teeth are.  The container seems to last forever so that compensates for the slightly high price for a toothpaste.  Keep in mind, it has no fluoride so if you need fluoride like I do, I mix this with crest for a bright shiny smile.

reviews.title: Best Tooth Powder
reviews.text: Love this product!  It keeps teeth white with a refreshing taste.

reviews.title: Baking soda for dental care
reviews.text: I have used baking soda for years and this particular one is very nice because it have a good minty flavor and works well ..

title: MAYZE Sonic Electric Toothbrush with 6 Brush Heads for Adults & Kids, One Charge for 60 Days, 5 Modes with 2 Minutes Smart Timer, 30000-VPM Rechargeable Electric Power Toothbrushes - Yellow
features: 【5 Modes to Suit Different Conditions of Teeth and Gums】Sonic Electric toothbrush with 5 mode for adluts and kids. Clean- Standard Daily Teeth Cleaning ; Soft- Gently Massages Gums ; Polish- Polish the Surface of the teeth ; Massage- for improving gums health and blood circulation; White- Removal of stubborn stains.

【Better protection of gums and deep cleaning】 The "W" shaped bristles are designed to fit the tooth shape and thoroughly clean the gums and hard-to-reach areas. Deep clean between teeth. Also because the density of bristles is 30% higher than other toothbrushes, it can remove 99.99% of plaque while better protecting gums.

【Once Charge for 2 Month + 6 Replacement Heads for over 18 Month Using】: This rechargeable toothbrush for adults can be used for 60 days per 8-hour charge . 6 premium DuPont toothbrush heads will last 18 months, saving your money for change new elcctric toothbrush.

【Smart 2-Mins Timer and IPX7 Waterproof】Sonic toothbrush with IPX7 rated waterproof design, so the entire toothbrush can be safely rinsed with water and you can safely use toothbrush in the bath or shower. And the built-in timer pulses every 30 seconds to helps ensure dentist-recommended brushing habits.

【Whiten your Teeth & Warranty】: MAYZE sonic electric toothbrush whiten your teeth in 14 days by powerful sonic technology. We promise: 1 year warranty, if you have any problems, please contact us, we will give you a satisfactory customer service.
【CONTACT US】Login your amazon account > choose "Your orders" > find the order ID > click "Contact seller".

reviews.title: Great value for the money sonic toothbrush
reviews.text:
Great adult sonic toothbrush for a nice value. One thing to note is this vibrates rather than spins. I am sure it helps clean better than a manual one, but I would prefer a spinning head for myself. Regardless, I enjoy using it. It comes with 6 replacement heads for a 18 month supply, which is pretty impressive. Has a 2 minute timer as well as 5 cleaning modes. 60+ day charge. Nice black color. Easy to use & charge. Great value for the money.

Amazon will donate to your favorite charity! Use Amazon Smile (smile.amazon.com) when you order and Amazon will donate to the charity of your choice when you make a qualifying purchase. Check out how Amazon Smile works at https://smile.amazon.com/gp/chpf/about/ref=smi_se_rspo_laas_aas. My shopping is donating to my charity of choice; Unravel, at no cost to me! Unravel is a nonprofit organization working to spread knowledge about the grim realities of pediatric cancer and the devastating impact from the lack of funding. All monies raised by and for Unravel will go directly to the fight against pediatric cancer.

reviews.title: Attractive yellow color!
reviews.text: First of all, I love this bright yellow colored electric toothbrush! A refreshing change from the regular black and  white sonic electric toothbrushes that are on the market right now! The bristles are ordinary but the extra brush heads make up for it. The price is just the same like the regular sonic brushes right now so it is worth a try!

reviews.title: Strong Vibration
reviews.text: Works well with strong vibration. Timer works well with 30 seconds intervals. Brushes well with soft bristles. The only thing that I personally don't like is the slippery handle. Otherwise it is a good product. Shipping was fast.

reviews.title: The Yellow is Very Cheerful
reviews.text: This is a nice electric toothbrush for the price. It has multiple settings (clean, soft, polish, massage, and white), although I tend to leave it on white most of the time. The sunny yellow color is really quite cheerful and is a bright start to the day. The bristles are softer than others I've used, which is nice for those of us who tend to brush too hard. I really like that the brush head (and even the bristles) match the body... all in the same sunny yellow. I'm also impressed that it came with so many replacement brush heads, each with their own cover. I won't need to buy replacements for a long time! I'm pretty impressed overall.

reviews.title: Really Like It!
reviews.text: This toothbrush is sleek and powerful and I really like all of the different settings. It has a good battery life - I have only had to charge it twice so far.

reviews.title: great deal
reviews.text: Really cannot pick because of the price. Item as described and came with a very simple bib. These work as awesome teethers for my twins but in order to make it work for toothbrushing independence, you do need a cooperative toddler who's willing to bite down and keep the teeth between the brushes. If your kids are willing to bite down and brush with these, they work great for encouraging toddlers to maintain healthy dental hygiene. I think it's already awesome for the price and works great as a teether.

features: INDIVIDUALLY WRAPPED: Each medium soft toothbrush is individually wrapped in a paper casing. Toothbrush Height: 7 Inches. This ensures that the toothbrushes are well protected from germs and bacteria and can be easily redistributed. These manual toothbrushes design with ergonomic shape and grip handle for maximum control while brushing. A great low cost option for everyday use or for those ones and done circumstances.

MEDIUM SOFT BRISTLES: Medium soft toothbrush bristles are made soft to the touch to prevent any damage from being done to the enamel of your teeth when removing plaque. Brush away & feel the difference!

STANDARD SIZE: These medium soft toothbrush are standard sized. They are intended for adults but children can use them as well. Each Pack oral toothbrush comes with a variety of colors so you don’t mistake your brush with your friends or family members. Give your favorite color to your family member or pass this along to a friend when going on adventures.

WHOLESALE TOOTHBRUSHES: There are so many uses for toothbrushes in bulk quantity. Commercially, they can be redistributed in hotels, Airbnb apartments, dental offices, community events, school rooms, to the homeless and the needy, and hygiene drives. They are also great for personal use if you are a frequent traveler, or are in the habit of disposing of your toothbrushes often.

PERFECT TRAVEL TOOTHBRUSH: Our disposable manual toothbrushes pack is perfect for traveling, camping, business trips and those on the go. Use them as little or as long as you’d like and toss them out when you’re done! This makes them extremely convenient for everyday use or buy as wholesale toothbrush for donation.

reviews.title: Love buying quality in bulk!
reviews.text: These toothbrushes are hard bristle though very sturdy! And such a deal for the price for the amount and quality of the item!! It is hard to separate the toothbrushes by hand, deft need scissors. But aside from that one minor drawback, they're perfect!

reviews.title: Great value
reviews.text: Great value, cute packageing. Great for travel or guests.

reviews.title: Nice quality and colors
reviews.text: Bought these to pack in hygiene kits for people in crisis, so they had to be individually wrapped to keep them hygienic and clean. They came in strips of 10 with perforations in between to separate each toothbrush. unfortunately, some of the seals between the toothbrushes split open when I cut them apart. I did not "tear" them apart, I very carefully cut them apart with long scissors, but the seal just wasn't good enough to hold. Maybe 4 out of 50 weren't usable because of this, which is unfortunate as we needed all 50. The price point was so reasonable, though, that this flaw could be forgiven.

reviews.title: Thumbs up
reviews.text: Used these as gifts for goodies bags for our women’s conference.

reviews.title: Good AND bad!!
reviews.text: They work but only lasts for like 3 uses, BUT at this price I like a new brush every 3 uses snyway so thats it! If you are looking for a brush that lasts a month (yuck) this aint it but if you want a fresh brush every couple days go for it.

reviews.title: Five Stars if it suits your needs.
reviews.text:
First of all, the base color was supposed to be black and it is what they call black, but it’s kind of a copper a metallic black not a true black.
The design is compact and it works very well.
I even like the little cord holder that comes with it as it’s very ergonomically designed.
The unit works just fine for my sonicare by Phillips.
I happen to have the one with a glass. After using this a couple of days I realized I like the look of the glass better than I like this.
On the other hand, if you have a very small space in which to put it on your sink, you may prefer something with a smaller silhouette; the footprint is the same, but it’s just not as big a presence because you don’t have the height and width of the glass.

reviews.title: Just as original
reviews.text: I got this to replace mu original charger for electric toothbrush, it looks just like it and so far, it has been working as the original, would recommend.

reviews.title: Great replacement or spare charger for Sonicare
reviews.text:
I really like my Sonic Care toothbrush and take it anywhere. So getting a second charger was a no-brainer.
I chose the gold colored base and it really looks nice.

It works just like the original and comes with the clear plastic holder, but you can also use the glass cup on it if you like. The cable is nice and long and I like that it comes in black, which fits better with some décor. I think there are some choices in regard to color of the base and cable.

Nothing bad to say about them.
perfect for travel or if you have a second home and don't want to constantly take the charger with you; and of course as a replacement.

reviews.title: Great Value!
reviews.text: Fits my Oral B electric toothbrush. Bristle style is a little different than what I'm used to. But it cleans my teeth just as well as the name brand replacement toothbrush heads. Cant beat the price vs the comparable name brand.

reviews.title: Works fine. Medium soft.
reviews.text:
These are perfectly good replacement toothbrush heads.
They're what I would call a medium-soft bristle, which is about as soft as I like.

Minor points:
Many replacements now come with plastic hoods that snap on to protect the brush from airborne contaminates. These don't.

OEM brushes let you swap the little colored rings on the base, so you can always keep your favorite color. These don't. They have different colors, but they can't be changed.

reviews.title: Great value
reviews.text:
Replacement brush heads can be so expensive. That's why I love finding value replacements online.
Nice price for the 4 brush heads. These are good for one person for a year at least.
Brushes are soft so no damaging my gums or teeth.
Works perfect with my oral b.

reviews.title: Fits perfect, soft feeling, strong
reviews.text:
I've been using OralB floss action toothbrush heads for a long time.

While these aren't floss action they clean my teeth nicely.

They fit the OralB toothbrush perfectly, actually felt a little click when I connected it.

The bristles are softer than the brush heads I've been using.

After almost a week of use they seem to be holding up well and feel very strong while using them.

At a little over $2 per head they are a pretty good deal.

reviews.title: It's a good toothbrush
reviews.text: It's a good toothbrush. I like that it vibrates every 30 seconds to help you keep track of the time. The brush tips are not too stiff as to be uncomfortable but stiff enough to get the job done.

reviews.title: Surprisingly fantastic!
reviews.text:
[[VIDEOID:be0e9ab7d6ac2bbe6f1a5308058bc84a]] I have tried other electric toothbrushes but this one exceeded my expectations. My teeth felt clean and I love the built in timers. No more second guessing if you have brushed long enough with this one.

The toothbrush has a great battery life. It took several hours to fully charge but once the light indicator turned from red to green; I haven’t had to charge it again. I have brushed my teeth more than 6 times and the battery is still going strong.

Another great feature is the ability to choose cleaning speeds and (cleaning and whitening) modes with the push of a button. I really enjoyed the high frequency clean mode. When I use this toothbrush, my teeth and tongue feels amazing day and night.

And finally, I was delighted to get 5 refill brush tips. The brush tips have a small profile making it easier to brush my wisdom teeth and the bristles are gentle to my gums. This is a great toothbrush with so many features making it a good value for about $30.

reviews.title: Love this!
reviews.text:
I have no idea how they make a battery last so long! It’s a wonder for sure! I have not needed to charge this thing since I got it, and that was weeks ago.
I love all the color combos that goes with this. There’s black, pink, white… so you can actually blend it in with your bathroom decor.
I opted for the black because our new granite tops are very dark in color.
There are a bunch of attachments that I might never use, but appreciate!
And for this price?! This is an awesome price point. You can’t go wrong with this rechargeable tooth brush.

reviews.title: I’m pleased with it
reviews.text: It’s a good tooth brush..it takes a little getting used to because I’m accustomed to a bigger brush head..but it works great.

reviews.title: Amazing Price and Works Great!
reviews.text:
First off, this toothbrush is so pretty. I ordered the Green, which is really a deep turquoise with attractive, shiny gold accents. It's lightweight but feels substantial, not at all cheap. It also comes with a whopping eight (8) brush heads, which is enough for 2 years. Amazing. I also really like the brush size. Many brushes are too big for adequate brushing, but this is a really nice size. The bristles are not overly stiff, so they don't irritate my gums.

Everything with this brush is powered by a single button, pushed multiple times to change modes and held down to turn off manually. Clean mode lasts 2 minutes with a pause every 30 seconds to change quadrants before finally turning off on its own. Additional modes are Polish (I googled to discover that this helps remove stains and shine teeth post brushing), Milder (for sensitive teeth), White (whitening), and Gum Care/Massage. Obviously, the vibration makes a sound, but it's on par with the loudness of other electric toothbrushes I have used

A really nice feature is that this does not require a separate charging base. The charging cord is built right into the base (which means you cannot lose it) and accessed by twisting and removing the gold piece at the bottom, and it plugs into any USB port. When charging is complete, the USB sticks back into a slot, and the base twists back on. A full charge is expected to last 45 days, though I haven't had it long enough to know if that pans out yet!

Overall, this is a high-quality electric toothbrush that has everything you could possibly need. I'm really happy with it.

reviews.title: Vibrates vigorously
reviews.text: This toothbrush is charged by a USB cord that comes from the bottom.  Its cord is approximately 3.5 inches.  When it is charging, it blinks red and then goes to solid red when fully charged.  It comes with 8 brushes and has 5 settings. It took me a little bit to get used to because it vibrates more than any toothbrush I have ever used.  I guess that is why it is called a sonic toothbrush.  After using it several times I am now used to it, and it does do a very good job at cleaning my teeth.  I have been using it about a week and so far, I only charged it the one time.

title: Philips Sonicare Genuine G2 Optimal Gum Care Replacement Toothbrush Heads, 3 Brush Heads, White, HX9033/65
description: The Philips Sonicare Optimal Gum Care brush head features a convex trim profile specifically designed to offer a gentle, even clean along the gum line. Compatible with all click-on Sonicare models, these replacement brush heads are proven to improve gum health up to 100% better than a manual toothbrush. Use with a Philips Sonicare BrushSync(TM) compatible handle (DiamondClean Smart or ProtectiveClean) to unlock Smart features: BrushSync mode-pairing triggers your handle to select optimal mode and intensity level for exceptional plaque removal (certain models only); BrushSync replacement technology tracks how often and how hard you brush and will notify you when it is time to replace your brush head. Also, reminder bristles fade to let you know when it's time for replacement. Replace your brush head every 3 months as recommended by the American Dental Association. A fresh brush head every 3 months maximizes the effectiveness of Philips’ unique Sonicare technology. Subscribe & Save on genuine Philips Sonicare brush head replacements and save up to 15%.

reviews.title: Indeed my gums improved after switching to this type brush head.
reviews.text:
There is a truth which dentists will tell you but is not widely discussed otherwise: Too much, too vigorous tooth brushing, and brushing with too stiff bristles will possibly damage the gums. Having said this, my dental hygienist is the one who broke the news to me that gums were starting to recede. She suggested a softer brush head for my Sonicare and to never supplement with hand brushing if the electric brush is available.

These brush heads fit the newer models of Philips Sonicare but I don't know about older models. They are listed as G2 and, compared to the more commonly found S2 brush heads, are less worrisome to use. Indeed there was significant gum healing since the checkup where the hygienist had warned me. So I'm hoping to continue to use them.

This review is unsolicited and uncompensated.

title: Oral-B CrossAction Toothbrush Heads - 16 Degree Bristles for Superior Cleaning
description:
Product Description
The Oral-B CrossAction brush head is our most advanced replacement brush and is now available as a Black Edition. With the perfectly angled CrissCross bristles, it goes deep into the interdental spaces and ensures a superior plaque removal compared to a conventional manual toothbrush. The blue indicator bristles indicate when to change the brush head. The brush head is compatible with all Oral-B electric toothbrushes except Oral-B Pulsonic. 3 Oral-B CrossAction Black Edition replacement toothbrush heads are included.
Set Contains:
3 x replacement brushes.
features: Advanced brush heads reach deep between the teeth
With the perfectly angled CrissCross bristles
The blue indicator bristles indicate when to change the brush head

reviews.title: Great for Sensitive Gums and Teeth
reviews.text:
I was told by my dentist to switch toothbrushes from manual to Oral-B electric toothbrush because it stops brushing when you brush too hard and keeps your enamel in tact, which helps relieve sensitive teeth. The dentist also recommended Oral-B because it was a good price point and has great features like a timer for 2 minutes and gets really close to the gum to get rid of icky plaque. Since I have been using Oral-B, he has noticed that I no longer have any plaque build up between cleanings and my sensitive teeth are gone. He also says my teeth look whiter and brighter. I love the toothbrush because it is light and easy to hold and get to those hard to reach places in the back of your mouth. It also leaves your teeth feeling extremely clean compared to a manual toothbrush. I can never go back to a regular toothbrush now because I tried on vacation once and felt absolutely disgusting in comparison. Oral-B is definitely the way to go for a clean mouth feel!

mouthwashes to ACT Restoring because it restores enamel that is weak and will alleviate sensitivity and use Glide Comfort Floss. Boy, was she correct. After just a few days of using the mouthwash I no longer feel that uncomfortable sensation on my teeth. I also am no longer needing prescription strength toothpaste. I now use this mouthwash twice daily and floss once a day, in combination with Sensodyne's Repair and Protect toothpaste. My gums do not bleed when I floss and I don't dread flossing. Glide floss goes easily between even the tightest teeth and has a lovely mint flavor that helps freshen breath at the same time. Changing the floss and mouthwash have made a huge improvement and now I can eat hot or cold foods without wincing in pain.
